center.name: 萊邦博山
center.summary: 萊邦博山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括灰鶲，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is also thought to be a non-breeding migrant in Mozambique and the Lebombo Mountains and southern Lowveld of Eswatini. The species inhabits a variety of forest and woodland
